summary: Critical crash risks, silent boot failures, and build artifacts in git. Zero tests.
top_actions: Fix unhandled TypeErrors in json.loads and widen exception guards in server.py
Add logging to the bare except block in http_shim.py to stop silent boot failures
Remove build/ directory from source control and add to .gitignore

roaster.summary: Build junk in git, uncaught TypeErrors, leaky logs, weak error handling.

findings.issue: json.loads on non-string filters/sorts raises TypeError, not caught by _call_tool's (KeyError, ValueError) guard
findings.say: json.loads eats strings, not dicts. TypeError ain't ValueError—boom, unhandled. Fix guard.

findings.issue: except Exception swallows startup failures silently with no logging
findings.say: Swallowing all startup exceptions without a log burp? 503 mystery meat. Log the wound.

findings.issue: json.loads on non-string input raises TypeError, not caught
findings.say: Pass a number for filters? `json.loads` throws TypeError, catch block snoozes. Crash.

findings.issue: httpx.AsyncClient leaks if telemetry.setup_telemetry raises after client creation
findings.say: Create client then crash on telemetry? Socket go brrr, never closed. Re-order or try/finally.

findings.issue: Narrow except (KeyError, ValueError) lets other handler exceptions escape as unhandled errors
findings.say: Only catching KeyError and ValueError? One surprise TypeError and your MCP frame weeps. Widen net.

findings.issue: Generated build artifact committed to source control
findings.say: Build folder in git? Stale bread. Ignore it.

findings.issue: json.dumps on tool args crashes if values aren't JSON-serializable
findings.say: One weird datetime and your span dies first.

findings.issue: list_topics and validate_model assume resp is list or dict; crash otherwise
findings.say: Omni returns null? AttributeError party. Type-check your JSON, caveman.

mammoth.summary: Artifacts committed, missing tests, swallowed errors, fragile types.

findings.issue: Python build artifact committed to source control
findings.say: Commit build/ dir. Generated code in repo bad.

findings.issue: Bare except Exception at boot swallows startup failures without logging
findings.say: Swallow boot error, no log. Blind when server sick.

findings.issue: Build artifact directory committed to source control.
findings.say: Build lib must not live in repo. Remove and gitignore.

findings.issue: No unit tests for handlers, schema builders, or HTTP shim
Config parsing and server construction run at module import time
findings.say: Import-time side effects. Hard to test, hard to mock.

findings.issue: Tool dispatch only catches KeyError/ValueError; other exceptions escape unhandled
findings.say: Catch too narrow. Unexpected errors leak out.

findings.issue: Six Omni handlers duplicate identical telemetry/track + try/except boilerplate.
findings.say: DRY handler wrapping—one decorator cuts six copy-paste error blocks.

findings.issue: Meta response leaks internal repo path and codename ('infra beaver cluster_mcp_grafana.py').
findings.say: Scrub internal repo paths from API surface; operators can read docs instead.
